case_title: THOMAS,EMMA vs. PECKHAM, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS,EMMA AS TO DEFENDANT PECKHAM, GARY PECKHAM, DORIS PECKHAM, CHRISTINA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-26-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-19-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-02-1999, OFF CALENDAR MARCH 2, 1999 POS, OSC

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-26-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY DONALD G DAVIS HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-05-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DONALD G DAVIS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-20-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAY-05-1999 TO JUN-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS,EMMA
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT PECKHAM, GARY PECKHAM, DORIS PECKHAM, CHRISTINA DOES 1 TO 20
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-16-1999, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED ON 6-16-99.
